user_input:
I am Arjun Mehta, 27 years old, living in Pune. I have been working 
as a product analyst at a mid-size fintech for 3 years, earning 
Rs 11L per year. I have been building a B2B SaaS startup called 
RestockIQ on the side for 8 months — it helps restaurants manage 
inventory using AI predictions. I have 2 LOIs signed and 3 more 
restaurants interested. I have Rs 4L in savings. Groww just offered 
me a Product Manager role at Rs 18L CTC. My parents want me to take 
the safe job. Should I quit my job and go full time on RestockIQ or 
take the Groww offer?
